allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([v for v in vs if v.startswith\('0.12'\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); print\({k:v for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'react-native' in k or 'build-prop' in k}\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([v for v in vs if v.startswith\('14.'\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([v for v in vs if v.startswith\('10.'\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[v for v in vs if 'nightly' not in v and 'alpha' not in v and 'beta' not in v and 'rc' not in v]; print\(stable[-10:]\)")
